ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' callout: 'コレ' rendered as 'つし' — recurring kana-shape substitution artifact seen across multiple pages in this batch

reviewer_notes: ISMS content page (15-03 情報セキュリティマネジメント). Body text covering ISMS definition, ISO/IEC 27001, クラウドセキュリティ認証, and ISMSにおけるPDCA is faithfully reproduced. The PDCA table (4 rows: P/D/C/A with Japanese descriptions) is correctly rendered in markdown. The 'コレ→つし' wrong_char in the exam callout is a cosmetic artifact. Furigana 'アイエスエムエス' present and correct.
